key_suppliers: Chinese-based companies (raw materials for ruxolitinib phosphate)
Third-party contract manufacturers (API and finished drug product)
dependencies: Single source or limited number of suppliers for API and finished product
Raw materials for ruxolitinib phosphate supplied by Chinese-based companies
Single source for JAKAFI raw materials
Reliance on third-party manufacturers for clinical and commercial products
Takeda as sole source for ponatinib API manufacturing
risks: International trade dispute between China and United States could limit raw material supply
Actions by Chinese government limiting Chinese companies from supplying materials
Single source supplier risks for API and finished products
Third-party manufacturer disruptions from equipment malfunction, regulatory actions, raw material shortages, labor disputes, cyberattacks, natural disasters, wars or geopolitical events
Potential acquisition or cessation of contract manufacturing operations by third parties
Inflation and rising costs affecting raw materials and manufacturing
Supply chain disruptions from public health pandemics (e.g., COVID-19)
Geopolitical events affecting supply chain (e.g., Russian invasion of Ukraine, Middle East conflicts)

regulatory_risks: FDA approval delays or denials for drug candidates
Complete response letters requiring additional clinical data
Post-approval requirements including confirmatory clinical trials
Regulatory approval withdrawal or suspension
Changes in FDA policies and increased scrutiny of accelerated approvals
Foreign regulatory approval uncertainties (EMA, MHLW, NMPA)
Compliance with current Good Manufacturing Practices (cGMP)
Health care fraud and abuse laws (False Claims Act, anti-kickback provisions)
Off-label promotion restrictions
Physician Payment Sunshine Act reporting requirements
State marketing compliance programs and disclosure requirements
Environmental, health and safety regulations
Data privacy regulations (GDPR in EU, state laws in US)
HIPAA compliance for patient data
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act and UK Bribery Act compliance
Medicaid Drug Rebate Program compliance
Medicare Part D requirements
340B drug pricing program expansion
Price transparency and drug pricing regulations
Government healthcare reform and cost control initiatives
Inflation Reduction Act provisions (drug price negotiations, rebates, excise tax)
American Rescue Plan Act (elimination of Medicaid rebate cap)
Patent term and exclusivity changes
Generic drug competition and Hatch-Waxman Act challenges
Orphan drug exclusivity requirements
Pediatric exclusivity provisions
International patent protection uncertainties
Antitrust scrutiny of acquisitions
BEPS 2.0 global minimum tax implementation
Tax law changes affecting research and development expense capitalization
Climate-related disclosure requirements (SEC Release Nos. 33-11275; 34-99678)

sanction_risks: International trade dispute between China and United States affecting raw material supply
Sanctions, embargoes, and supply shortages from geopolitical events
Russian invasion of Ukraine leading to sanctions and regional instability
Middle East conflicts causing adverse effects on operations
Currency exchange rate impacts from geopolitical events
Financial market disruptions from sanctions and embargoes
